title: Encryption, Encryption Protocols and Digital Certificates
summary: 9618 — symmetric vs asymmetric encryption, SSL/TLS, and PKI certificates.
learningObjectives: Outline how HTTPS secures web communication.

simpleExplanation.title: Keeping data confidential and trusted
simpleExplanation.summary: Encryption scrambles data so only authorised parties read it. Certificates bind public keys to verified identities.
steps: Symmetric: same key encrypts and decrypts.

sections.content: **Encryption** (17.1) links **6.1 data security** to **14.1 protocols**. Draw **key exchange** steps for asymmetric encryption.
